articles.author: Rod McGuirk
articles.title: 3 Australian women returning from Syria are arrested on suspicion of slavery and terrorism offenses - AP News
articles.description: Three Australian women have been arrested on suspicion of slavery and terrorism charges after they returned from Syria. The women and nine children arrived on two flights from Doha. Their alleged crimes are linked to their time spent in the Islamic State grou…
articles.content: MELBOURNE, Australia (AP) Three women who were among 13 Australians returning home from Syria were arrested at airports on Thursday on allegations of slavery and terrorism inside the Islamic State gr… [+3190 chars]
